title: saprosma glomerata
intro: Saprosma glomerata is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Java tea or Java tea shrub. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its diuretic and expectorant effects, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as acting as an antimicrobial agent to combat infections. Herbal preparations of Saprosma glomerata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
